name: Senior Citizen Benefits (OSCA / RA 9994)
description: Mandatory benefits for Filipinos aged 60+ including discounts, social pension, and priority services
benefits: 20% discount on medicines, medical services, transport, and utilities; ₱500/month social pension (indigent); priority lanes
documents: PSA Birth Certificate (if ID age unclear)
office: Office of Senior Citizens Affairs (OSCA) at your City/Municipal Hall
next_steps: Visit OSCA at your LGU to apply for Senior Citizen ID
If indigent (no pension, low income), apply separately for Social Pension via DSWD
